name: Alpha-Beta World (based in ratatatat74's pics)
description:
For the survival of the human species, a new order was created where males would have to go through an inteligence test, physical test and appearance test. Depending on the results, males will be clasified in two groups, Alphas and Betas.

(A version of the previous bot where you can choose how your character will be. Woman, Beta or Alpha? What will you be?)
creator: sissy_tammy
